html: I try to always mention that AMD ROCm has come a long way. Like the B70 the Radeon AI Pro 9700 has 32GB of DDR6 640GB/s. Also $1300 a card. Very capable cards now in mid 2026. Great for dense models in the 30B range. I'd go strix halo or DGX spark if you want to run the 120B range of MOE models.
